description:
A modern and secure instant messaging for people, business and healthcare


[Feature] Emoji: JoyPixels 11.0 Emoji support
[Fixed] Calls: Fixed an issue where a microphone warning could incorrectly appear during a call
[Fixed] Calls: Fixed an issue where audio quality could degrade over time
[Fixed] Chat Window: Fixed an issue that prevented spelling errors from being corrected properly
[Fixed] Contact List: Fixed several docking issues
